name: pretty-mermaid
description: Render beautiful Mermaid diagrams as SVG or ASCII art using the beautiful-mermaid library. Supports 15+ themes, 5 diagram types (flowchart, sequence, state, class, ER), and ultra-fast rendering. Use this skill when: rendering a mermaid diagram or processing .mmd files; creating a flowchart, sequence, state, class, or ER diagram; applying a theme or beautifying a diagram; batch processing multiple diagrams; producing ASCII / terminal-friendly diagrams; or visualizing architecture, workflows, or data models.
